prompt: Which statement best matches serializability as used in database isolation discussions?
choices: Results match some serial execution of the transactions
Every read is linearizable to a global wall clock
Writes flush to disk before ack
correctAnswer: Results match some serial execution of the transactions

prompt: Raft uses randomized timeouts primarily to:

correctAnswer: Reduce split votes and elect a leader efficiently

prompt: Which anomaly can still occur under snapshot isolation but is ruled out by serializable isolation?
choices: Write skew on disjoint predicate reads
Non-repeatable reads on the same row
Two sessions writing the same primary key without conflict checks
correctAnswer: Write skew on disjoint predicate reads

correctAnswer: Detect which parts of state differ
